claims: Defines DetectorBudgetCompatible as a finite arithmetic compatibility certificate.
Proves every finite extracted physical detector witness satisfies the finite compatibility certificate.
Proves compatibility exposes active-mass equality with finite sampled total energy.
Proves compatibility exposes sample-count equality with finite support size.
Proves compatibility exposes detector-cell count equality with partition cell count.
Proves compatible extracted active mass is nonnegative.
Proves compatible extracted detector-id length equals partition cell count.
Proves compatible empty-data extracted active mass is zero.
